comment: Pilot-focused JSON2Video plan. Use demo characters only. No fake government approval or endorsement.

scenes.title: Start Small In Abuja
scenes.prompt: Realistic documentary video in Abuja, Nigeria. A patient arrives at a selected primary healthcare centre while staff prepare for a small digital coordination pilot. Warm daylight, practical public-health tone, no fake government seal.

scenes.title: Selected PHCs, One Hospital, Pharmacy Partners
scenes.prompt: Clean visual montage of selected PHCs, one general hospital, doctors, pharmacy partners, and a Ministry dashboard connected by subtle interface lines. Practical, not sci-fi, no over-focus on AI.

scenes.title: PHC Intake
scenes.prompt: Nurse Grace captures Amina Yusuf's basic request at Demo PHC Garki on a tablet. No diagnosis, no private data, no emergency drama.

scenes.title: Doctor Review
scenes.prompt: Dr. Musa Ibrahim reviews a patient request and consults remotely where appropriate. Calm Nigerian healthcare setting, professional clinical workflow.

scenes.title: Prescription Or Referral
scenes.prompt: Pharmacist Ada sees prescription visibility and Mr. Bello receives a referral summary. Show role-based coordination without exposing patient-level data.

scenes.title: Ministry Dashboard
scenes.prompt: Ministry dashboard user views aggregate pilot indicators: 128 patient requests, 86 consultations, 34 referrals, 52 prescriptions, 74 percent follow-up visibility, 18-minute response time.

scenes.title: Pilot Timeline
scenes.prompt: Public-health implementation timeline with alignment, configuration, training, controlled launch, evaluation, and scale decision. Practical Abuja pilot tone.

scenes.title: Handover
scenes.prompt: Formal Abuja conference room ready for Jonah Baka's human PowerPoint presentation. No avatar, no fake approval, no fake government seal.

voice.direction: Calm female healthcare narrator, warm and reassuring, clear English, professional public-health explainer tone, suitable for a Ministry healthcare presentation.
voice.finalLine: This is the care journey DoctaRx proposes to strengthen. Jonah Baka will now present the pilot roadmap and partnership details.
